stem:
In her 1983 book The Managed Heart: Commercialization of Human Feeling, sociologist Arlie Russell Hochschild first explored at length her conception of a “sociology of emotions”—the idea that the various cultural and ideological frameworks a person has internalized (class, gender, political affiliation, etc.) _______ each emotional reaction that person has within a situation.

Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
explanation: The subject of the verb is the plural “frameworks,” so the plural verb “underlie” is required for subject-verb agreement. “Underlies,” “is underlying,” and “has been underlying” are all singular forms that don’t agree with the plural subject.
